memoryArtifacts.headline: John Thimbleby (1470)
memoryArtifacts.description: John Thimbleby Knighted 13 Oct 1513. During the reception of prince Charles and Margaret of Savoy by Henry VIII at Tournay. After the Battle of Flodden Field fought against the invading Scotts. Info from "The Knights of Engalnd Vol 2

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Thimbley Sr於1482年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Richard Thimbleby31歲，母親Elizabeth Hilton27歲。他於1507年之前與Margaret Boys結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Thimbley Sr于1482年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Richard Thimbleby31岁，母亲Elizabeth Hilton27岁。他于1507年之前与Margaret Boys结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thimbley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name, primarily from Thimbleby (Lincs), but also from Thimbleby (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Thimbley Sr was born in 1482, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Richard Thimbleby, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Hilton, was 27. He married Margaret Boys before 1507. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1550, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Thimbley Sr est né en 1482, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Thimbleby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hilton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Boys avant 1507. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1550, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Thimbley Sr 1482 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Thimbleby 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hilton 27. Er hat vor 1507 Margaret Boys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1550 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Thimbley Sr è nato il nel 1482 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Thimbleby, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hilton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Boys prima del 1507. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1550, nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Thimbley Srが1482年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Thimblebyは31歳，母Elizabeth Hiltonは27歳であった。1507年以前にMargaret Boysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Thimbley Sr(이)가 1482년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Thimbleby(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hilton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1507년 이전 Margaret Boys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Thimbley Sr nasceu em 1482, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Thimbleby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hilton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Boys antes 1507. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1550, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Thimbley Sr родился в 1482 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Thimbleby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hilton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Boys перед 1507 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1550 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Thimbley Sr nació en 1482, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Thimbleby, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hilton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Boys antes de 1507. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1550, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
